---
title: "Master Lexicon"
---

| Sigil | Term                           | House                                                          | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ----- | ------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 0001  | abstraction                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A deliberate forgetting of detail so larger structure can be reasoned about without drowning in mechanism. Shadow: hiding the only failure that matters.                                |
| 0002  | adapter                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A negotiated translator between unlike shapes. Use it when two systems must meet without infecting one another. Shadow: adapter jungles that preserve confusion rather than resolve it. |
| 0003  | agent                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An acting word; a named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.                                                                                                 |
| 0004  | aggregate                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0005  | anti-corruption layer          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0006  | API gateway                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A threshold that centralizes entry, policy, and routing at the edge of a service world. Shadow: a convenience chokepoint that quietly becomes a monolith.                               |
| 0007  | architecture                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A world-shaping word; it names the large order into which many smaller decisions must fit.                                                                                              |
| 0008  | artifact boundary              | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0009  | assembler                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0010  | backbone                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0011  | backend                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0012  | boundary                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | The line that says where one responsibility ends and another begins. Shadow: porous edges that smear blame, ownership, and test scope.                                                  |
| 0013  | bounded context                | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A protection against semantic bleed: the same word may not mean the same thing in every subsystem. Shadow: false unification through shared names.                                      |
| 0014  | bridge                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0015  | broker                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0016  | builder                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0017  | bus                            | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0018  | capability                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0019  | channel                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0020  | client                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0021  | cluster                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A many-body word; several machines are treated as one operational unit.                                                                                                                 |
| 0022  | command bus                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0023  | component                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0024  | composition                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0025  | connector                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0026  | container                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0027  | control plane                  | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0028  | coordinator                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0029  | core                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0030  | coupling                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | The hidden tax paid when change in one place forces change elsewhere. Name it early if you want modularity to survive contact with reality.                                             |
| 0031  | daemon                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0032  | data plane                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0033  | decorator                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0034  | dependency inversion           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | Stable policy should not kneel before unstable detail. Shadow: concrete dependencies hard-wired into places that should remain portable.                                                |
| 0035  | dispatcher                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0036  | domain model                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0037  | edge service                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0038  | engine                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0039  | entrypoint                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0040  | event bus                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0041  | event handler                  | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0042  | executor                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0043  | facade                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0044  | factory                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0045  | feature module                 | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0046  | frontend                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0047  | gateway                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0048  | graph                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0049  | handler                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0050  | hierarchy                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0051  | hook                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0052  | host                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0053  | hub                            | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0054  | implementation                 | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0055  | interface                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A disciplined seam that lets unlike bodies cooperate without swapping internal organs. Shadow: tight coupling and type bleed.                                                           |
| 0056  | interpreter                    | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0057  | kernel service                 | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0058  | layer                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0059  | library                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0060  | listener                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0061  | machine boundary               | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0062  | mediator                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0063  | mesh                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0064  | microservice                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A partition word; a system is cut into independently deployed service bodies.                                                                                                           |
| 0065  | middleware                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0066  | module                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A containment word; related definitions are packaged as one coherent unit.                                                                                                              |
| 0067  | monolith                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0068  | namespace                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0069  | node                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0070  | observer                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0071  | orchestrator                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A conducting word; many services or tasks are coordinated into one larger procedure.                                                                                                    |
| 0072  | package                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0073  | pipeline                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A procession word; work passes through ordered stages.                                                                                                                                  |
| 0074  | platform                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0075  | plugin                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0076  | port                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A contact word; a defined point of communication or adaptation.                                                                                                                         |
| 0077  | presenter                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0078  | process manager                | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0079  | producer                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0080  | projection                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0081  | protocol boundary              | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0082  | proxy                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A stand-in word; one body speaks or receives on behalf of another.                                                                                                                      |
| 0083  | queue                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0084  | reactor                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0085  | receiver                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0086  | registry                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0087  | repository                     | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A custody word; an official place from which versions or entities are retrieved.                                                                                                        |
| 0088  | resource boundary              | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0089  | router                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0090  | scheduler                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A tempo word; it apportions time among contenders.                                                                                                                                      |
| 0091  | seam                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A composition-word; it lets many smaller parts behave as one larger form.                                                                                                               |
| 0092  | service                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A duty word; a stable capability exposed for repeated use by others.                                                                                                                    |
| 0093  | service mesh                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A side-channel governance word for service-to-service traffic.                                                                                                                          |
| 0094  | session boundary               | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0095  | shard                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A splitting word; one logical body is divided across multiple partitions.                                                                                                               |
| 0096  | shim                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0097  | singleton                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0098  | source of truth                | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An authority word; one record or service is treated as canonical.                                                                                                                       |
| 0099  | stack                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A layering word; order matters and the most recent thing is nearest the top.                                                                                                            |
| 0100  | stage                          | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0101  | state machine                  | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A lawful-transition word; only certain moves are allowed from each state.                                                                                                               |
| 0102  | strategy                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0103  | subsystem                      | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0104  | surface                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0105  | system                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0106  | template method                | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0107  | tree                           | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0108  | use case                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0109  | value object                   | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A structure-word; it gives responsibility a place to live.                                                                                                                              |
| 0110  | worker                         | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A labor word; a designated body performs tasks delegated by some larger system.                                                                                                         |
| 0111  | workflow                       | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | An order-word; it constrains how complexity is arranged rather than merely accumulated.                                                                                                 |
| 0112  | wrapper                        | Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | A boundary-word; it shapes how one part may touch another.                                                                                                                              |
| 0113  | abstract class                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0114  | alias                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0115  | annotation                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0116  | argument                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0117  | arity                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0118  | assembly                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0119  | assertion                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0120  | AST                            | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0121  | attribute                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0122  | binding                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0123  | borrow                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0124  | borrow checker                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0125  | bytecode                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0126  | capture                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0127  | cast                           | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0128  | class                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape word for bundled state and behavior.                                                                                                                                            |
| 0129  | closure                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A capture word; it carries surrounding bindings forward with executable intent.                                                                                                         |
| 0130  | coercion                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0131  | comment                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0132  | compile-time                   | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0133  | compiler                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0134  | constant                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0135  | constraint                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A bounding word; it removes degrees of freedom in order to improve correctness.                                                                                                         |
| 0136  | constructor                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0137  | contravariance                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0138  | covariance                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0139  | currying                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0140  | declaration                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0141  | decorator                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0142  | default                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0143  | definition                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0144  | denotation                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0145  | destructor                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0146  | dispatch                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0147  | domain-specific language       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0148  | dynamic scope                  | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0149  | effect                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0150  | enum                           | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0151  | evaluation                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0152  | export                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0153  | expression                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0154  | extern                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0155  | field                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0156  | final                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0157  | function                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A callable word; given inputs, it yields outputs by a named rule.                                                                                                                       |
| 0158  | generic                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0159  | grammar                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0160  | higher-order function          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0161  | identifier                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0162  | impl                           | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0163  | implementation                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0164  | import                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0165  | include                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0166  | inference                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0167  | inheritance                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0168  | inline                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0169  | instruction                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0170  | interface                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A boundary word; it lets different bodies touch through a disciplined seam.                                                                                                             |
| 0171  | interpreter                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0172  | IR                             | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0173  | keyword                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0174  | lambda                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0175  | lexical scope                  | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0176  | lifetime                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0177  | linker                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0178  | literal                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0179  | loader                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0180  | macro                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0181  | metaprogramming                | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0182  | method                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0183  | mixin                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0184  | module                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A containment word; related definitions are packaged as one coherent unit.                                                                                                              |
| 0185  | monomorphization               | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0186  | mutability                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0187  | name resolution                | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0188  | namespace                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0189  | object                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0190  | opcode                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0191  | overload                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0192  | override                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0193  | ownership                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0194  | package                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0195  | parameter                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0196  | parametric polymorphism        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0197  | parser                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0198  | pattern                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0199  | pattern matching               | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0200  | polymorphism                   | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0201  | procedure                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A method word; not just what to do, but in what order to do it.                                                                                                                         |
| 0202  | program                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0203  | property                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0204  | protected                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0205  | public                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0206  | purity                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0207  | qualified name                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0208  | readonly                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0209  | record                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0210  | reference                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0211  | referential transparency       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0212  | reflection                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0213  | resolution                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0214  | return type                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0215  | runtime type                   | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0216  | scope                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0217  | sealed                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0218  | semantics                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0219  | signature                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A proving word; identity or contract is made checkable.                                                                                                                                 |
| 0220  | source code                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0221  | specialization                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0222  | statement                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0223  | static dispatch                | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0224  | strictness                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0225  | struct                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0226  | subtype                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0227  | supertype                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0228  | symbol                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0229  | syntax                         | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0230  | template                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0231  | theorem                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0232  | token                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.                                                                                                             |
| 0233  | trait                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0234  | transpiler                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0235  | tuple                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A semantics word; it alters what symbols are allowed to mean in practice.                                                                                                               |
| 0236  | type                           | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-and-law word; it governs what operations are permitted and what meanings attach.                                                                                                |
| 0237  | type alias                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0238  | type inference                 | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0239  | type system                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0240  | typechecker                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0241  | typeclass                      | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0242  | unification                    | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0243  | union                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0244  | value                          | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0245  | variance                       | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0246  | virtual                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A shape-of-thought word; it influences how programs are written and reasoned about.                                                                                                     |
| 0247  | visibility                     | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0248  | visitor                        | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A grammar-word; it shapes how meaning is expressed to humans and machines.                                                                                                              |
| 0249  | where-clause                   | Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | A law-of-form word; it changes what the language can guarantee.                                                                                                                         |
| 0250  | address                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0251  | aggregate state                | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |
| 0252  | array                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0253  | bag                            | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0254  | binary blob                    | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |
| 0255  | bit                            | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0256  | bitmap                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0257  | blob                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0258  | block                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0259  | Bloom filter                   | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |

| 0265  | cache entry                    | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0266  | canonical form                 | Data, State, and Representation                                | A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.                                                                                                          |
| 0267  | cell                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |
| 0268  | checksum                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
