| 0291  | edge                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0292  | element                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0293  | embedding                      | Data, State, and Representation                                | A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.                                                                                                                                      |
| 0294  | entity                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0295  | enum value                     | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0296  | envelope                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0297  | event                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A happening word; something occurred and may now be recorded, reacted to, or replayed.                                                                                                  |
| 0298  | event log                      | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |

| 0303  | flag                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |

| 0306  | hash                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A condensation word; arbitrary input becomes a fixed fingerprint.                                                                                                                       |
| 0307  | hash map                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0308  | header                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |

| 0311  | index key                      | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0312  | item                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |

| 0321  | matrix                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0322  | message                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A carrier word; intent or state is wrapped for transport between components.                                                                                                            |
| 0323  | metadata                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0324  | model                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representative word; a simplified structure stands in for a larger reality.                                                                                                           |
| 0325  | multimap                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0326  | node                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |

| 0329  | offset                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |

| 0332  | payload                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0333  | pointer                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A location word; it does not hold the thing, but where the thing may be found.                                                                                                          |
| 0334  | pool                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0335  | property                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |

| 0341  | representation                 | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0342  | resource                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A bounded-thing word; something that must be acquired, used, and released.                                                                                                              |
| 0343  | revision                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0344  | ring buffer                    | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |

| 0346  | scalar                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0347  | schema                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | The declared shape of stored meaning. Shadow: drift, silent coercion, and backward-incompatible surprise.                                                                               |
| 0348  | secret                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A guarded-value word meant to remain hidden except to the few who must know it.                                                                                                         |
| 0349  | segment                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0350  | sequence                       | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0351  | series                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0352  | session                        | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |

| 0354  | sketch                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0355  | slice                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |

| 0357  | sparse vector                  | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0358  | stack item                     | Data, State, and Representation                                | A representation-word; it gives state a vessel or surface.                                                                                                                              |
| 0359  | state                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A condition word; what the system is like right now.                                                                                                                                    |
| 0360  | stream item                    | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |

| 0365  | token                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.                                                                                                             |
| 0366  | tree node                      | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |

| 0368  | tuple                          | Data, State, and Representation                                | A storage-word; it determines how meaning is carried through memory or transport.                                                                                                       |
| 0369  | vector                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0370  | view                           | Data, State, and Representation                                | A shape-of-state word; it influences what later transformations are easy or hard.                                                                                                       |
| 0371  | window                         | Data, State, and Representation                                | A matter-word; it names something that can be held, moved, or compared.                                                                                                                 |
| 0372  | aggregate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0373  | amortize                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0374  | analyze                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0375  | annotate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0376  | approximate                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0377  | archive                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0378  | assemble                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0379  | batch                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0380  | bucket                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0381  | canonicalize                   | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0382  | classify                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0383  | clean                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0384  | clone                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0385  | coalesce                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0386  | collect                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0387  | compact                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0388  | compare                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0389  | compile                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A transmutation word; it transforms one language into another fit for execution.                                                                                                        |
| 0390  | compress                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0391  | compute                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0392  | condense                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0393  | convert                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0394  | correlate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0395  | decode                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0396  | decrypt                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An unsealing word; protected meaning becomes legible again under the right key.                                                                                                         |
| 0397  | deduplicate                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0398  | defer                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0399  | delete                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0400  | denoise                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0401  | derive                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0402  | deserialize                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0403  | detect                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0404  | diff                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A difference word; it names what changed between two states.                                                                                                                            |
| 0405  | digest                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0406  | dispatch                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0407  | distribute                     | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0408  | drain                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0409  | drop                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0410  | encode                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0411  | encrypt                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A warding word; it hides meaning from everyone except the right holder of the key.                                                                                                      |
| 0412  | enumerate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0413  | evaluate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0414  | expand                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0415  | explode                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0416  | export                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0417  | extract                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0418  | fetch                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0419  | filter                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0420  | flatten                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0421  | fold                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0422  | format                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0423  | fuse                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0424  | generate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0425  | group                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0426  | hash                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A condensation word; arbitrary input becomes a fixed fingerprint.                                                                                                                       |
| 0427  | hoist                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0428  | hydrate                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0429  | infer                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A consequence word; it derives hidden structure from visible evidence.                                                                                                                  |
| 0430  | inline                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0431  | instrument                     | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0432  | integrate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0433  | interpolate                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0434  | invert                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0435  | isolate                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0436  | join                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A union word; separate streams, sets, or histories are brought into one result.                                                                                                         |
| 0437  | lex                            | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0438  | link                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A joining word; separate symbols are resolved into one executable body.                                                                                                                 |
| 0439  | map                            | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0440  | marshal                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0441  | materialize                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0442  | measure                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0443  | memoize                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0444  | merge                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A reconciliation word; separate lines of change are brought back together.                                                                                                              |
| 0445  | migrate                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0446  | minify                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0447  | model                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A representative word; a simplified structure stands in for a larger reality.                                                                                                           |
| 0448  | normalize                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A regularizing word; irregular forms are bent toward a standard shape.                                                                                                                  |
| 0449  | optimize                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0450  | paginate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0451  | parallelize                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0452  | parse                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A structure-finding word; raw symbols become an ordered tree or sequence.                                                                                                               |
| 0453  | partition                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0454  | patch                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A repair word; a bounded alteration is applied to an existing body.                                                                                                                     |
| 0455  | pipeline                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procession word; work passes through ordered stages.                                                                                                                                  |
| 0456  | prepare                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0457  | preprocess                     | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0458  | profile                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A hotspot-seeking word; it reveals where time or resources are actually spent.                                                                                                          |
| 0459  | project                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0460  | prune                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0461  | quantize                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0462  | query                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An asking word; it requests structure or records from stored state.                                                                                                                     |
| 0463  | rasterize                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0464  | rebalance                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0465  | reconcile                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0466  | reconstruct                    | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0467  | reduce                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0468  | refactor                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A reshaping word; structure changes while intended behavior is preserved.                                                                                                               |
| 0469  | reformat                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0470  | rehydrate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0471  | reindex                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0472  | render                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0473  | reorder                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0474  | replicate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0475  | reshape                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0476  | resolve                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0477  | restore                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0478  | rewrite                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0479  | sample                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0480  | sanitize                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0481  | scan                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0482  | schedule                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0483  | search                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0484  | segment                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0485  | serialize                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A flattening word; structured state is turned into a transportable sequence.                                                                                                            |
| 0486  | shard                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A splitting word; one logical body is divided across multiple partitions.                                                                                                               |
| 0487  | shuffle                        | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0488  | sign                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A sealing word; origin or integrity is bound cryptographically to content.                                                                                                              |
| 0489  | smooth                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0490  | sort                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0491  | specialize                     | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0492  | split                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0493  | stage                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0494  | stream                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A flow word; values arrive over time rather than all at once.                                                                                                                           |
| 0495  | summarize                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0496  | synthesize                     | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0497  | tokenize                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A work-word; it describes how material is processed into some next state.                                                                                                               |
| 0498  | trace                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A path-of-execution word preserved for later reading.                                                                                                                                   |
| 0499  | train                          | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0500  | transform                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change word; the material remains connected to its former self while taking new form.                                                                                                 |
| 0501  | translate                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0502  | transpose                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0503  | truncate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0504  | tune                           | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A change-word; it alters form, order, or representation.                                                                                                                                |
| 0505  | unmarshal                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0506  | unpack                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | An alchemical word; it moves data from one shape into another.                                                                                                                          |
| 0507  | update                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0508  | validate                       | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A gatekeeping word; inputs or outputs are checked against an expected form.                                                                                                             |
| 0509  | vectorize                      | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0510  | verify                         | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A truth-checking verb; it demands evidence that a claim or result actually holds.                                                                                                       |
| 0511  | zip                            | Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | A procedure-word; it tells software what kind of transformation is underway.                                                                                                            |
| 0512  | abort                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0513  | acknowledge                    | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0514  | async                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0515  | await                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A suspension word; it pauses one flow so other work may continue.                                                                                                                       |
| 0516  | backoff                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0517  | barrier                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A rendezvous word; no party crosses until all required parties arrive.                                                                                                                  |
| 0518  | block                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0519  | branch                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A divergence word; execution or history splits into alternate paths.                                                                                                                    |
| 0520  | break                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0521  | callback                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0522  | cancel                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0523  | case                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0524  | catch                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0525  | chain                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0526  | choose                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0527  | circuit breaker                | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0528  | clause                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0529  | continue                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0530  | coroutine                      | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0531  | countdown                      | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0532  | cycle                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0533  | debounce                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0534  | defer                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0535  | delay                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0536  | dispatch                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0537  | do                             | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0538  | else                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0539  | enqueue                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0540  | event loop                     | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A circulation word; work is accepted, queued, and resumed by recurrent inspection.                                                                                                      |
| 0541  | fallback                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0542  | fan-in                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0543  | fan-out                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0544  | finally                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0545  | fire-and-forget                | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0546  | flow control                   | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0547  | for                            | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0548  | fork                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0549  | future                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0550  | gate                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A permission word; passage occurs only when conditions hold.                                                                                                                            |
| 0551  | guard                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0552  | halt                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0553  | heartbeat                      | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0554  | if                             | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0555  | iterate                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0556  | join                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A union word; separate streams, sets, or histories are brought into one result.                                                                                                         |
| 0557  | jump                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0558  | latch                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0559  | loop                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0560  | match                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0561  | mutex                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | An exclusion word; only one actor may enter the critical region at a time.                                                                                                              |
| 0562  | notify                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0563  | once                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0564  | parallel                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0565  | pause                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0566  | poll                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0567  | preempt                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0568  | priority                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0569  | process                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sovereignty word; an executing program with its own protected address space.                                                                                                          |
| 0570  | promise                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0571  | queue                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0572  | race window                    | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0573  | recurse                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0574  | repeat                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0575  | reserve                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0576  | retry                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | Failure does not necessarily end the ritual; policy may permit another attempt. Shadow: blind repetition against a broken precondition.                                                 |
| 0577  | return                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0578  | round-robin                    | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0579  | schedule                       | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0580  | select                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0581  | semaphore                      | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0582  | sequence point                 | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0583  | serialize access               | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0584  | signal                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0585  | sleep                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0586  | spawn                          | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0587  | step                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0588  | stop                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0589  | suspend                        | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0590  | switch                         | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                                                             |
| 0591  | sync                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0592  | synchronize                    | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                                                                      |
| 0593  | task                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
| 0594  | terminate                      | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                                                               |
| 0595  | then                           | Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                                                                     |
