| 1140  | acceptance test                | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1141  | alert                          | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1142  | assertion                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1143  | audit log                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1144  | backtrace                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1145  | baseline                       | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1146  | benchmark                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A performance claim forced to meet measurement. Benchmarks are where speed rhetoric either cashes out or dies.                                                                          |
| 1147  | black-box test                 | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1148  | canary check                   | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1149  | check                          | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1150  | code coverage                  | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1151  | conformance                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1152  | contract test                  | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A promise checked at the seam between systems. Use it when mocks are too flattering and end-to-end tests are too blunt.                                                                 |
| 1153  | core dump                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1154  | counter                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1155  | dashboard                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1156  | debugger                       | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A seeing word; it arrests motion so hidden state may be inspected.                                                                                                                      |
| 1157  | diagnostic                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1158  | error budget                   | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1159  | evaluation                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1160  | expectation                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1161  | fixture                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1162  | flame graph                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1163  | fuzzing                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1164  | gauge                          | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1165  | golden test                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1166  | harness                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1167  | health probe                   | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1168  | histogram                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1169  | hypothesis                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1170  | incident report                | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1171  | integration test               | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1172  | invariant                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A law that must remain true while the rest of the system is allowed to move. If you cannot say the invariant, you probably do not yet understand the change.                            |
| 1173  | load test                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1174  | log                            | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A remembrance word; events are written so that they may be later inspected or replayed.                                                                                                 |
| 1175  | logger                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1176  | metric                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1177  | mock                           | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1178  | model check                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1179  | monitor                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1180  | observability                  | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | Enough internal evidence exists that you can infer what the system is doing from the outside. Not logs alone: legible state under pressure.                                             |
| 1181  | oracle                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1182  | postcondition                  | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1183  | precondition                   | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1184  | profiler                       | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1185  | proof                          | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1186  | property-based test            | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | Instead of checking one remembered example, ask whether a law survives many generated cases. Use it when you care more about the invariant than the anecdote.                           |
| 1187  | regression test                | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1188  | replay                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1189  | sampling                       | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1190  | sanity check                   | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1191  | simulation                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1192  | smoke test                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1193  | snapshot test                  | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1194  | soak test                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1195  | solver                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1196  | span                           | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1197  | stack trace                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1198  | static checker                 | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1199  | stress test                    | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1200  | stub                           | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1201  | symbolic execution             | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A discipline word; it converts intuition into measurable evidence.                                                                                                                      |
| 1202  | telemetry                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | Measurements leaving the system in a form other systems can compare, store, and alert on. Shadow: metric exhaust without explanatory power.                                             |
| 1203  | theorem                        | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1204  | trace                          | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A preserved path through execution. Use it when the question is not only what failed, but where the causal thread first bent.                                                           |
| 1205  | tracer                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A revelation word; it exposes hidden state so a claim can be checked.                                                                                                                   |
| 1206  | triage                         | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1207  | unit test                      | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1208  | validation                     | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1209  | verifier                       | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A proving-word; it asks whether a claim is actually true.                                                                                                                               |
| 1210  | white-box test                 | Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | A truth-seeking word; it narrows the gap between what is believed and what is known.                                                                                                    |
| 1211  | accelerator                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1212  | alignment                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1213  | ASIC                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1214  | assembly instruction           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1215  | atomic instruction             | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1216  | bandwidth                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1217  | barrier                        | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A rendezvous word; no party crosses until all required parties arrive.                                                                                                                  |
| 1218  | bit width                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1219  | boot ROM                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1220  | branch predictor               | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1221  | bus                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1222  | cache                          | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A nearness word; it keeps likely things close to reduce future cost.                                                                                                                    |
| 1223  | cache coherence                | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1224  | cache line                     | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1225  | clock                          | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1226  | clock cycle                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1227  | co-processor                   | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1228  | core                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1229  | CPU                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1230  | cycle budget                   | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1231  | DMA                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1232  | DRAM                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1233  | driver interrupt               | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1234  | EEPROM                         | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1235  | endianness                     | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1236  | fence                          | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1237  | firmware                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1238  | flash                          | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1239  | FPGA                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1240  | frame budget                   | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1241  | frequency                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1242  | GPIO                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1243  | GPU                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1244  | heat budget                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1245  | I2C                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1246  | instruction cache              | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1247  | instruction pointer            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1248  | interrupt service routine      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1249  | ioctl boundary                 | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1250  | IPC cost                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1251  | ISA                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1252  | jitter                         | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A timing-noise word; repeated operations arrive with unstable spacing.                                                                                                                  |
| 1253  | JTAG                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1254  | kernel bypass                  | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1255  | latency budget                 | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1256  | memory channel                 | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1257  | memory-mapped I/O              | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1258  | microcode                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1259  | MMIO                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1260  | NUMA                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1261  | NVRAM                          | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1262  | opcode                         | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1263  | out-of-order execution         | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1264  | PCIe                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1265  | pipeline                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A procession word; work passes through ordered stages.                                                                                                                                  |
| 1266  | power budget                   | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1267  | prefetcher                     | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1268  | real-time                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1269  | register                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; a tiny, privileged vessel close to execution itself.                                                                                                                 |
| 1270  | register file                  | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1271  | reset vector                   | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1272  | ROM                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1273  | RTOS                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1274  | runtime budget                 | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1275  | sensor loop                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1276  | SIMD                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1277  | SPI                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1278  | SRAM                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1279  | superscalar                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1280  | thermal throttling             | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1281  | throughput                     | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | How much useful work the system can push through a narrow world in bounded time. Shadow: chasing bulk capacity while tail latency burns the user.                                       |
| 1282  | timing window                  | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1283  | TPU                            | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A near-metal word; it matters when abstraction is no longer cheap enough.                                                                                                               |
| 1284  | UART                           | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1285  | utilization                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1286  | vector unit                    | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | An embodiment word; software here speaks almost directly to silicon or wire.                                                                                                            |
| 1287  | volatile                       | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1288  | watchdog timer                 | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A performance-and-physics word; it governs timing, placement, and finite material limits.                                                                                               |
| 1289  | wire speed                     | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A machine-word; it reaches into clocks, buses, registers, or heat.                                                                                                                      |
| 1290  | zero-copy                      | Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | A nearness-and-efficiency word; data moves without redundant duplication.                                                                                                               |
| 1291  | accessibility                  | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1292  | adaptive layout                | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1293  | affordance                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1294  | animation                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1295  | app shell                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1296  | breadcrumb                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1297  | call to action                 | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1298  | click target                   | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1299  | component                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1300  | confirmation                   | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1301  | copy                           | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1302  | dark mode                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1303  | discoverability                | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1304  | empty state                    | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1305  | error state                    | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |

| 1308  | form validation                | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |

| 1310  | grid                           | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.                                                                                                           |
| 1311  | hierarchy                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1312  | hover state                    | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |

| 1322  | microcopy                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1323  | modal                          | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An experience word; it changes how the system feels to inhabit.                                                                                                                         |
| 1324  | navigation                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |

| 1326  | onboarding                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |

| 1331  | progressive disclosure         | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.                                                                                                           |
| 1332  | prompt surface                 | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1333  | responsive design              | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1334  | screen                         | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1335  | scroll state                   | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |

| 1337  | selection                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.                                                                                                           |
| 1338  | skeleton state                 | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.                                                                                                           |
| 1339  | state transition               | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |

| 1341  | sync state                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A visibility word; it shapes what users can notice, predict, or recover from.                                                                                                           |
| 1342  | table view                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1343  | theme                          | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1344  | tooltip                        | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1345  | typography                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1346  | user flow                      | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1347  | validation message             | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1348  | view model                     | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1349  | viewport                       | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | A human-facing word; it governs appearance, action, or understanding.                                                                                                                   |
| 1350  | visual hierarchy               | Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | An interface word; it binds software intent to human attention and action.                                                                                                              |
| 1351  | agent                          | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | An acting word; a named locus of initiative that may observe, decide, and invoke tools.                                                                                                 |
| 1352  | alignment                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1353  | annotation set                 | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1354  | benchmark prompt               | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1355  | canonical form                 | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A normalization word; many possible surfaces are forced into one agreed shape.                                                                                                          |
| 1356  | citation                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1357  | clause marker                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1358  | constraint                     | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A bounding word; it removes degrees of freedom in order to improve correctness.                                                                                                         |
| 1359  | context                        | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A surrounding word; it supplies the conditions under which symbols acquire force.                                                                                                       |
| 1360  | context window                 | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A horizon word; it marks how much text the model can keep active at once.                                                                                                               |
| 1361  | delegation                     | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1362  | deterministic decoding         | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1363  | embedding                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A closeness word; it places meaning into geometry.                                                                                                                                      |
| 1364  | evaluation                     | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1365  | evaluator                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1366  | example                        | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1367  | exemplar                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1368  | fallback                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1369  | few-shot                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1370  | fine-tuning                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1371  | function call                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1372  | goal                           | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | An aim word; it tells the spell what outcome matters most.                                                                                                                              |
| 1373  | grounding                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1374  | guardrail                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A limiting word; it narrows the model's allowed behavior without fully specifying the answer.                                                                                           |
| 1375  | hallucination check            | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A skepticism word; it forces the model to verify rather than merely continue.                                                                                                           |
| 1376  | instruction                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1377  | latent space                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1378  | memory                         | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1379  | message role                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1380  | multimodal                     | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1381  | normal form                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1382  | objective                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A directing word; it states what the spell is trying to cause.                                                                                                                          |
| 1383  | output contract                | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A form-binding word; it specifies the shape the answer must take.                                                                                                                       |
| 1384  | parser prompt                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1385  | plan                           | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1386  | planner                        | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A sequencing word; it arranges acts before they are executed.                                                                                                                           |
| 1387  | policy prompt                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1388  | procedure                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A method word; not just what to do, but in what order to do it.                                                                                                                         |
| 1389  | prompt                         | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it biases a generative system toward a role, task, and style of action.                                                                                             |
| 1390  | prompt injection               | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1391  | prompt surface                 | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1392  | ranking                        | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1393  | reasoning trace                | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1394  | reranker                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A refinement word; candidates are reordered after an earlier retrieval pass.                                                                                                            |
| 1395  | retrieval                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1396  | retrieval-augmented generation | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1397  | role                           | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | An invocation word; it frames what kind of actor the model should pretend to be.                                                                                                        |
| 1398  | rubric                         | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1399  | safety rail                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1400  | scaffold                       | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1401  | schema                         | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A shape word for stored meaning.                                                                                                                                                        |
| 1402  | section marker                 | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1403  | self-check                     | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1404  | shot                           | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A model-steering word; it affects what the system attends to, emits, or verifies.                                                                                                       |
| 1405  | spell                          | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A structured instruction artifact that binds role, goal, context, constraints, procedure, and verification into one operative text.                                                     |
| 1406  | spell number                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A Godel-style identifier for a canonicalized spell sequence.                                                                                                                            |
| 1407  | spell signature                | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A canonical token sequence or prime-exponent form standing in for an entire prompt.                                                                                                     |
| 1408  | step list                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1409  | system prompt                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A throne word; it sits above later instructions and frames the entire interaction.                                                                                                      |
| 1410  | task framing                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1411  | temperature                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A variance word in sampling; higher values loosen the model's preference ordering.                                                                                                      |
| 1412  | token                          | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A countable unit of text or symbol used for parsing, modeling, or encoding.                                                                                                             |
| 1413  | token stream                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1414  | tool call                      | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | An extension word; the model reaches beyond text into an external operation.                                                                                                            |
| 1415  | toolformer pattern             | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1416  | top-k                          | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A prompting word; it belongs to the ritual surface between human specification and machine response.                                                                                    |
| 1417  | top-p                          | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A conjuration word; it directs probabilistic software by language, retrieval, or evaluation.                                                                                            |
| 1418  | user prompt                    | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1419  | verification                   | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A truth-checking word that asks not merely for output, but for justified output.                                                                                                        |
| 1420  | vocabulary id                  | Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | A spellcraft word; it shapes how intent is framed before generation begins.                                                                                                             |
| 1421  | accessible                     | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A property word; it says what kind of behavior should remain true under stress.                                                                                                         |
| 1422  | adaptive                       | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A property word; it says what kind of behavior should remain true under stress.                                                                                                         |
| 1423  | amortized                      | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A virtue word; it names an operational quality that can guide design and evaluation.                                                                                                    |
| 1424  | approximate                    | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A property word; it says what kind of behavior should remain true under stress.                                                                                                         |
| 1425  | atomic                         | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | No halfway state is allowed to leak across the line. Use it when partial success would be indistinguishable from corruption.                                                            |
| 1426  | auditable                      | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A virtue word; it names an operational quality that can guide design and evaluation.                                                                                                    |
| 1427  | authenticated                  | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A virtue word; it names an operational quality that can guide design and evaluation.                                                                                                    |
| 1428  | authoritative                  | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A promise adjective; it binds the system to a stronger form of conduct.                                                                                                                 |
| 1429  | available                      | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A promise adjective; it binds the system to a stronger form of conduct.                                                                                                                 |
| 1430  | backward-compatible            | Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | A guarantee word; it claims a behavioral law rather than a mere preference.                                                                                                             |
